title: Totem of Plant Pot
description: This texture pack turns your usual totem item texture into a pretty 3D modelled plant pot !
body:
# Potted Plant Pack!
This ressource pack will transform your Totem of undying into a cute potted plant
_A nice little lavender pot..._
### works over 1.19 !
Changes model, texture, and item name [totem_of_undying -> Plant Pot]
